aliases: Ground forces of the United States Armed Forces
description: land service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Army (U.S. Army) is the land service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: 1939–1945 global conflict
description_wiki: World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Mississippi (  MISS-iss-IP-ee) is a state in the Southeastern and Deep South regions of the United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Louisiana (French: Louisiane; Spanish: Luisiana [lwiˈsjana]; Louisiana Creole: Lwizyàn) is a state in the Deep South and South Central regions of the United States.

description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

description: air service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Air Force (USAF) is the air service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Oregon (  ORR-ih-ghən, -⁠gon) is a state in the Pacific Northwest region of the United States.

aliases: American Federation of Musicians of the United States and Canada
description: union representing professional music in the U.S and Canada
description_wiki: The American Federation of Musicians of the United States and Canada (AFM/AFofM) is a 501(c)(5) labor union representing professional instrumental musicians in the United States and Canada.

description: airport serving the Greater Los Angeles Area
description_wiki: Los Angeles International Airport (IATA: LAX, ICAO: KLAX, FAA LID: LAX) is the primary international airport serving Los Angeles and its surrounding metropolitan area, in the U.S. state of California.

description: United States military facility and census-designated place in Prince George's County, Maryland
description_wiki: Joint Base Andrews (JBA) (IATA: ADW, ICAO: KADW, FAA LID: ADW) is a United States military facility located in Prince George's County, Maryland.

description: island country in East Asia
description_wiki: Japan is an island country in East Asia.

description: capital and largest city of Japan
description_wiki: Tokyo, officially the Tokyo Metropolis, is the capital and most populous city of Japan.

description: nonprofit-charitable corporation that provides live entertainment, social facilities, and other programs to members of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United Service Organizations Inc.

description: unincorporated territory of the United States of America
description_wiki: Guam (  GWAHM; Chamorro: Guåhan [ˈɡʷɑhɑn]) is an island that is an organized, unincorporated territory of the United States in the Micronesia subregion of the western Pacific Ocean.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Hawaii (  hə-WY-ee; Hawaiian: Hawaiʻi [həˈvɐjʔi, həˈwɐjʔi]) is an island state of the United States, in the Pacific Ocean about 2,000 miles (3,200 km) southwest of the U.S. mainland.

description: country in Southeast Asia
description_wiki: Thailand, officially the Kingdom of Thailand, and formerly known as Siam until 1939, is a country located in Mainland Southeast Asia.

description: 1956 Forrestal-class aircraft carrier
description_wiki: The seventh USS Ranger (CV/CVA-61) was the third of four Forrestal-class supercarriers built for the United States Navy in the 1950s.

description: body of water located off the coast of northern Vietnam and southern China, northern arm of the South China Sea
description_wiki: The Gulf of Tonkin is a gulf at the northwestern portion of the South China Sea, located off the coasts of Tonkin (northern Vietnam) and South China.

description: Jewish traditional folk song in Hebrew
description_wiki: "Hava Nagila" (Hebrew: הָבָה נָגִילָה, romanized: Hāvā Nāgīlā, lit. 'Let us rejoice') is a Jewish folk song.

description: duo of American feminist comedians
American gay rights activist (born 1942)
description_wiki: Robin Tyler (born Arlene Chernick, April 8, 1942) is a Canadian-born American comedian.

description: former province of Vietnam
former state in in Southeast Asia
description_wiki: South Vietnam, officially the Republic of Vietnam (RVN; Vietnamese: Việt Nam Cộng hòa, VNCH), was a country in Southeast Asia that existed from 1955 to 1975.

description: largest city in Vietnam
description_wiki: Ho Chi Minh City (HCMC; Vietnamese: Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, IPA: [tʰaɲ˨˩ fow˦˥ ho˨˩ cɪj˦˥ mɨn˧˧] ), also known as Saigon, is the most populous municipality of Vietnam, with a population of more than 14 million in 2025.
